title: Claude Code vs Codex: Which Should You ACTUALLY Use?
summary: Austin Marchese compares Codex and Claude Code across five categories: UI, technical output, design output, non-technical output, and cost/speed. He argues the Codex vs Claude Code framing is the wrong question and advocates focusing on a specific undisclosed factor that matters more than the tool choice itself.
